allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\('crypto'\); try { c.createCipheriv\('des-ecb', Buffer.alloc\(8\), null\); console.log\('DES OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('DES ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('crypto'\); const k = c.createPublicKey\({ key: { kty: 'RSA', n: Buffer.alloc\(128\).toString\('base64url'\), e: Buffer.from\([1,0,1]\).toString\('base64url'\) }, format: 'jwk' }\); console.log\('RSA JWK OK'\);")
